theme_description: A modern community Q&A template with layouts reminiscent of Discourse (forum chrome, sidebar navigation, timeline), Reddit-style linear feeds, and Stack Overflow–style structured threads. Includes publishing, nested replies, tags & collections, reactions, and site search—ideal for knowledge bases, FAQs, support hubs, and discussions.

prompts.page_restricted: This page can only be accessed with authentication

hero.default_slogan: 👋 A maker community to learn and grow together
hero.default_description: 👋 Our landing template works on every device—set it up once, stay consistent everywhere.

tags_hub.empty_collection_pages: No posts use this collection yet.

about.title: About this site
about.subtitle: Built with the Baklib Community template—features and getting started.
about.intro_p1: Baklib Community is a Q&A template with Reddit-style and Discourse-style layouts, plus publishing, nested replies, tags, collections, and timelines.
about.intro_scope: Great for knowledge bases, FAQs, technical support, and community discussion.
about.feat_posts: Posts: title, body, tags, and collections
about.feat_replies: Nested replies: unlimited depth; Reddit or Discourse presentation
about.feat_tags: Tags & collections for organization and discovery
about.feat_timeline: Timeline: Discourse layout shows thread milestones on the right
about.feat_related: Related topics to surface more content
about.feat_responsive: Responsive layout for desktop and mobile
about.feat_turbo: Turbo Stream updates without full page reloads
about.tut_install_body: Install from the Baklib marketplace, or add via Git:
about.tut_app_avatar: Default avatar for members without a photo
about.tut_app_review: Publish before review: when off, staff approve before content is public
about.tut_app_emoji: Primary feedback emoji: copied from feedback settings for post reactions
about.tut_cols_body: App settings → Collections: configure feature tags and collection tags. Enable “Show collection & feature tags” to show them in the sidebar and on posts.

generic.join_to: Sign in to reply—join the community

generic.under_review: This content is under review and not public yet
generic.discourse_signup_prompt: You look interested in this thread—create an account to take part.
generic.discourse_signup_benefits: Members can start topics, reply, and interact with others.
generic.terms1: Submitted content may need staff review before it appears on the site.
